waves.name: Wave 1
waves.summary: Maintainability audit baseline after Phase D service decomposition and shared frontend pattern extraction.

waves.name: Wave 2
waves.summary: Expanded hotspot tracking to top 10 API, top 3 worker, and top 3 frontend files. Added file-level line budgets.

apps/api/src/modules/pastoral/services/c.reason: Pastoral concern lifecycle and sharing remain one of the highest-risk maintainability hotspots because the service coordinates access control, state changes, and cross-entity relationship writes.

apps/api/src/modules/behaviour/behaviour.reason: Behaviour student views still aggregate history, summary, and parent-facing information across several tables, so new logic should stay bounded as the module evolves.

apps/api/src/modules/staff-wellbeing/ser.reason: Workload calculations mix personal, aggregate, and trend concerns; budgets help keep future additions inside the extracted helpers rather than back in the facade.

apps/api/src/modules/gradebook/report-ca.reason: Report cards remain a high-change module with lifecycle orchestration, approval flow, and query responsibilities that can regress into a god service without guardrails.

apps/api/src/modules/households/househol.reason: Household operations (create, merge, split) coordinate multi-entity writes across students, parents, addresses, and contacts with complex validation logic.

apps/api/src/modules/homework/homework-a.reason: Homework analytics aggregates trend, correlation, and pattern data across multiple tables with heavy branching for time-window and grouping logic.

apps/api/src/modules/behaviour/behaviour.reason: Sanction lifecycle involves creation with approval routing, conflict detection, and status transition logic that can grow unbounded without guardrails.

apps/api/src/modules/behaviour/safeguard.reason: Safeguarding concern reporting and triage involves access-controlled detail mapping, multi-step status transitions, and sensitive data handling.

apps/api/src/modules/pastoral/services/p.reason: DSAR processing aggregates records across all pastoral entities with complex record-type routing, summary assembly, and multi-entity fetch logic.

apps/api/src/modules/attendance/attendan.reason: Attendance bulk upload parses CSV/XLSX with row-level validation, conflict detection, and transactional commit that concentrates branching in a single flow.

apps/api/src/modules/behaviour/behaviour.reason: Core behaviour incident service with the highest single-function complexity in the codebase; createIncident orchestrates validation, participant handling, escalation, and notification dispatch.
Appeal lifecycle with decision branching, sanction reversal, and multi-party notification makes the decide and submit methods complex.

apps/api/src/modules/homework/homework.s.reason: Homework service manages CRUD, recurrence generation, and bulk operations with date computation and validation branching.

apps/worker/src/processors/early-warning.reason: Signal collection utilities contain the highest-complexity functions in the entire codebase; each collector aggregates data across multiple domains with extensive conditional logic.

apps/worker/src/cron/cron-scheduler.serv.reason: Cron scheduler is low-complexity per method but extremely long; line budget is the primary control to prevent unbounded growth as new cron jobs are added.

apps/worker/src/processors/communication.reason: Notification dispatch handles multi-channel routing (email, SMS, WhatsApp, push) with per-channel formatting and error handling branching.

apps/web/src/app/[locale]/(school)/sen/p.reason: SEN plan detail page is the largest frontend file with a monolithic component handling view, edit, review, and approval states in a single render function.

apps/web/src/app/[locale]/(school)/behav.reason: Appeal detail page has extreme render-function complexity with status-dependent UI sections, decision forms, and timeline rendering.

apps/web/src/app/[locale]/(school)/setti.reason: Behaviour admin settings page contains multiple tab components (operations, scope audit, retention) each with their own form handling and state.

apps/api/src/modules/staff-wellbeing/ser.reason: Workload compute service mixes personal, aggregate, and trend logic across 1161 lines

apps/api/src/modules/households/househol.reason: Household CRUD with merge/split orchestration across 1123 lines

apps/api/src/modules/homework/homework-a.reason: Homework analytics with trend/correlation/pattern queries across 1089 lines

apps/api/src/modules/behaviour/behaviour.reason: Sanction lifecycle with approval routing and conflict detection across 1079 lines

apps/api/src/modules/behaviour/safeguard.reason: Safeguarding concern triage and access-controlled detail mapping across 1070 lines

apps/api/src/modules/pastoral/services/p.reason: DSAR processing with multi-entity record aggregation across 1056 lines

apps/api/src/modules/attendance/attendan.reason: Bulk attendance upload with CSV/XLSX parsing and validation across 1041 lines

apps/api/src/modules/behaviour/behaviour.reason: Core behaviour incident service with the highest single-function complexity across 1012 lines
Appeal lifecycle with decision branching and sanction reversal across 988 lines

apps/api/src/modules/homework/homework.s.reason: Homework CRUD with recurrence generation and bulk operations across 986 lines

apps/worker/src/processors/early-warning.reason: Signal collection utilities with the highest complexity functions in the codebase across 1332 lines

apps/worker/src/cron/cron-scheduler.serv.reason: Cron scheduler grows as new jobs are added; line budget prevents unbounded expansion from 742 lines

apps/worker/src/processors/communication.reason: Multi-channel notification dispatch with per-channel formatting across 728 lines

apps/web/src/app/[locale]/(school)/sen/p.reason: Largest frontend file; monolithic SEN plan detail component across 961 lines

apps/web/src/app/[locale]/(school)/behav.reason: Appeal detail page with status-dependent UI and decision forms across 939 lines

apps/web/src/app/[locale]/(school)/setti.reason: Multi-tab behaviour admin settings page across 938 lines
